title: Windows Mimikatz Execution Patterns
description: Detects execution of Mimikatz or tools with Mimikatz-like command line patterns used for credential harvesting from Windows systems.
query: ('Log Source' = 'Windows Sysmon Events' or 'Log Source' = 'Windows Sysmon Operational Logs' or 'Log Source' = 'SOC Windows Sysmon Logs') and (('Process Name' like '*mimikatz.exe') or (('Command Line' like '*sekurlsa::logonpasswords*' or 'Command Line' like '*sekurlsa::wdigest*' or 'Command Line' like '*lsadump::sam*' or 'Command Line' like '*lsadump::dcsync*' or 'Command Line' like '*privilege::debug*' or 'Command Line' like '*token::elevate*')))
falsepositives: Authorized penetration testing with documented scope
